items.title: Trump Ally Says Will Seek Norway Visa Denials Over Caterpillar
items.description: “I’ve sent them the information,” Senator Lindsey Graham, a South Carolina Republican, said in an interview on Tuesday.  The fund took the step citing Israel’s use of Caterpillar bulldozers to destroy Palestinian property in Gaza and the West Bank.  “I appreciate the input, but the conduct of the sovereign wealth fund is outrageous and will not go unanswered,” Graham said on Tuesday, when asked about the message from the Norwegian premier.

items.title: 10 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
Skybound Service Partners Appoints Joe Dougherty as Chief Executive Officer
items.description: NEW YORK, September 03, 2025--Skybound Service Partners ("Skybound"), a leading commercial roofing services platform backed by Garnett Station Partners that partners with best-in-class contractors across the United States, today announced the appointment of Joe Dougherty as Chief Executive Officer.

items.title: AI Isn't A Bubble. It's A $100 Trillion Tailwind For My Portfolio
items.description: Big Tech may dominate headlines, but the real opportunity lies in the mission-critical infrastructure enabling this AI revolution. Read which stocks I've been buying.
